options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <value> # Specifies minimum pulse width check value (float, required) <object_list> # List of objects: pins, ports or clocks

options.name: -high
options.description: Specifies for high min pulse width

options.name: -low
options.description: Specifies for low min pulse width

options.name: -waveform_aware_type
options.description: {absolute source_width_ratio} waveform aware pulse width check to apply value as absolute or source_width_ratio
